description: Plugin-distributed hooks for itsm-service-management. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this ITSM deliverable against the §2 house opinions (every SLA backed by OLAs/UCs, a major incident has a commander + comms, date+source every benchmark/tool figure). Set ITSM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
